courses.desc: A slot for web-first story design, linking, structure, and multimedia packaging.

courses.name: Data Journalism
courses.desc: A data-journalism coursework document on bachelor housing, cost pressure, and the everyday economics of living solo in Dhaka.

courses.name: News Editing and Translation
courses.desc: A slot for headline discipline, translation judgement, and copy-editing decisions.

courses.name: Investigative Journalism-I
courses.desc: A dossier for source protection, evidence chains, investigation planning, and the architecture of a serious reporting project.

courses.name: Investigative Journalism-II
courses.desc: Advanced investigation portfolio currently in progress.

courses.name: Communication Concepts and Theories
courses.desc: A theory notebook for the core vocabulary of communication study.

courses.name: Media and the Law
courses.desc: A coursework essay on communication, technology, and the politics embedded in technical systems.

courses.name: Mass Communication
courses.desc: A theory notebook covering models, institutions, effects, and public communication debates.

courses.name: Convergence Communication 1
courses.desc: A production notebook connecting scripting, planning, shooting, editing, and reflection.

courses.name: Convergence Communication 2
courses.desc: A second convergence coursework project focused on visual rhythm, production planning, and post-production choices.

courses.name: Communication and Technology
courses.desc: Analytical coursework on the politics embedded in technical systems.

courses.desc: Argument structure, source use, and academic prose.

courses.desc: A slot for long-form academic writing and source synthesis.

courses.desc: Two coursework outputs connecting statistical reasoning with research design, newsroom judgment, and public-interest interpretation.

courses.desc: Bangla-language writing practice for clarity, argument, and public communication.

courses.name: Introduction to Philosophy
courses.desc: A humanities coursework essay built around close reading, argument, and interpretation.
